channel.title: INmaster
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INmaster, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. court bars OpenAI from using ‘Cameo’
item.description: OpenAI has renamed its feature in Sora from "Cameo" to "Characters."

item.title: Good News in History, February 18
item.description: 20 years ago today, American speed skater Shani Davis became the first Black athlete to win a gold medal in Winter Olympic history for an individual e...

item.title: Intellexa’s Predator spyware used to hack iPhone of journalist in Angola, research says
item.description: Amnesty International says it found evidence that a government customer of Intellexa, a sanctioned surveillance vendor, used its Predator spyware agai...

item.title: Tesla dodges 30-day suspension in California after removing ‘Autopilot’
item.description: The decision comes a month after Tesla discontinued Autopilot, its basic driver-assistance system.

item.title: An Inside Look at Lego’s New Tech-Packed Smart Brick
item.description: Lego’s next release is a digital brick loaded with sensors that add new layers of interactivity to its play sets. WIRED got exclusive access to the Le...

item.title: The Best Way to Pay Your Taxes Online (2026)
item.description: Paying US federal and state taxes online can be confusing, and one wrong move can result in penalties or extra money owed. We break it down so you can...

item.title: How to Choose the Bamboo Sheets for You (2026)
item.description: Bamboo makes some of the softest bedding you can find. Here’s how it’s made and how it’s different from cotton and linen bedding.

item.title: Lowe’s Promo Codes and Deals: Up to 40% Off Appliances
item.description: Find the latest Lowe’s promo codes and offers, including up to 40% off select major appliances and $5 off $50 with sign-up, here at WIRED.

item.title: Lovehoney Discount Codes and Deals: Up to 70% Off
item.description: Save on Lovehoney, including bestselling toys, lingerie, and popular gift sets for date nights, self-care, and couples’ play.

item.title: Deal of the day: Fly to Jamaica for only 8,000 American Airlines AAdvantage miles
item.description: Ready for some fun in the Caribbean sun? You can visit Jamaica for less with this deal.

item.title: Antarctica reading list: The 8 best books to read before a trip
item.description: It pays to do your homework before a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Antarctica

item.title: Crack Chicken Tacos
item.description: Get ready to be instantly obsessed with these crack chicken tacos! They are loaded with creamy ranch chicken, crispy bacon,…

item.title: Guide to Bilt Dining: How to earn bonus points and snag exclusive reservations
item.description: Bilt Rewards members can use Bilt Wallet and Bilt Dining to earn more points at select restaurants across the U.S. Here's everything you need to know.

item.title: Destination Dollywood: First-ever Dolly Parton-themed flight to take off later this year
item.description: Guests traveling between Orlando and Knoxville, Tennessee, can book this one-of-a-kind experience to Dolly Parton's "Tennesee Mountain Home."

item.title: IHG just debuted its newest premium brand: Noted Collection
item.description: IHG's new premium brand, Noted Collection, will feature one-of-one hotels known for the individuality, with each stay offering various signature exper...

item.title: ‘Mushroom Mining’ Could Be Cheap Way to Recover Rare Earth Minerals from Industrial Waste
item.description: Decades of underinvestment in mining and refining across Europe and North America has landed the manufacturing sector in a problem, which a group of s...

item.title: Ford turns to F1 and bounties to build a $30,000 electric truck
item.description: A combination of 3D-printed Lego-like parts, Formula 1 thinking, and a bounty program will help the company hit that target. The team, led by Tesla ve...

item.title: Mysterious ‘Hero’ Dog Leads Police Straight to Missing 3-year-old Officer Says in Body Cam Video
item.description: A police officer and self-described “dog guy,” hooked his own instincts up to those of a local dog to find a missing 3-year-old in Kentucky. There was...

item.title: Jack Altman joins Benchmark as GP
item.description: Jack Altman and Benchmark announced today that he would be joining the firm as a general partner.

item.title: Volunteers Save 51 Dogs in Large-Scale Operation Following Arkansas Shelter Collapse
item.description: From Arkansas comes the story of a huge animal rescue operation of 51 dogs trapped in a derelict shelter. Headquartered in neighboring Nashville, the ...

item.title: Urban Farm Shops Combine Dutch Greenhouse Technology and Food-Retail into One
item.description: In the city of The Hague, a Dutch agri-tech firm has had the bright idea of combining a greenhouse grow operation with a grocery and delivery business...

item.title: Starbucks Copycat Chocolate Pistachio Loaf
item.description: Starbucks dropped a new Chocolate Pistachio Loaf, and I was instantly obsessed. The pistachio flavor and that rich chocolate swirl…

item.title: Why lunch is the main meal in some countries

item.title: Jobless claims fall to lowest level since mid-May
Jobless claims stay low in latest week
Consumer credit growth soars in December
